text: it says 37hrs, but my main save has over 250hrs not including expeditions. this game is worth every dollar. for 10 years they been tossing out free updates, and that is way more generous than they need to be. you guys already redeemed yourselves, but the more you pump out, the more of us will be here to support em. if you are reading this as of may 28th, make sure if you get the game to do the new swarm expedition. get lost in the game, have fun, do what you wish, but never forget sodium or oxygen, youll need a lot of it. 10/10 game and devs. kick ass into the future and we are ALL waiting for Light No Fire.
Came back to the game after 5 years. It is not the same game, it's a tragedy now after the recent update.

Played for 2 minutes. 
Died of a heart attack trying to get a tie off off a ceiling fan.

10/10
No ultra wide support, has keyboard ui despite using controller
Game is literally unplayable. Tech keeps turning off, incense will not burn, firelight takes 10 minutes to light.
